headline: World's Richest Man Elon Musk Gets Even Richer As Tesla Stocks Soar
summary: The net worth of Elon Musk witnessed a staggering increase of over $30 billion on Thursday, following a significant surge in Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) shares.

headline: Consumer Tech News (Oct 21-Oct 25): Apple May Scale Back Production Of Vision Pro Headset, Netflix Restructures Gaming Division
summary: Rupert Murdoch's Dow Jones and New York Post sue Jeff Bezos-backed Perplexity for copyright infringement and Disney, Netflix make strategic moves.

headline: AI Demand Fuels Record Profits, Chip Controversies, And Tech Giants Redefine AI Landscape: This Week In The World Of Artificial Intelligence
summary: The tech world had a busy week with AI at the center of it all. From record-breaking profits to potential export violations, here's a roundup of the top stories.

headline: Apple's Week Of Peaks And Valleys: From Record iPhone Sales To Legal And Regulatory Challenges
summary: Apple's rollercoaster week: facing U.S. probe, patent dispute, streaming services leaving App Store, but sets new iPhone sales record.

headline: Tesla Celebrates Milestone With 1 Millionth Model Y Produced At Fremont's Iconic 'Big Tent' Facility
summary: EV giant Tesla said on Friday that it has built its one millionth Model Y SUV at GA4 in the Fremont factory.

headline: Delta Air Lines Sues CrowdStrike For $500M Over July Outage That Disrupted Flights, Affecting 1.3M Customers
summary: Delta Air Lines has filed a lawsuit against cybersecurity firm CrowdStrike in a Georgia state court, following a global outage in July that led to widespread flight cancellations.

headline: Apple Secures Victory In Masimo Patent Dispute With Token Damages Of $250
summary: A Delaware jury has ruled in favor of Apple in a patent infringement case against Masimo, awarding Cupertino a symbolic $250 in damages.

headline: Google Is Working On An AI System Named 'Jarvis' To Handle Your Search, Shopping, And Flight Booking Needs: Report
summary: Google's 'Project Jarvis' AI system is designed to handle tasks like research, shopping, and booking flights on behalf of users.
